2.description: get 200-year storm-surge polygons within Kristiansand bbox

3.description: get 200-year flood polygons within Kristiansand bbox

5.description: find buildings that intersect storm-surge polygons

6.description: find buildings from previous step that also intersect flood polygons

10.description: return only bygningid for final output

-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, ST_XMin(omrade) AS xmin, ST_YMin(omrade) AS ymin, ST_XMax(omrade) AS xmax, ST_YMax(omrade) AS ymax
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, omrade FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna
WHERE omrade && ST_MakeEnvelope(62543.56990607368, 6428946.019998128, 107683.72996255726, 6493405.01999838, 25833);
